name: Pebble Beach Golf Links
designer: Jack Neville & Douglas Grant (5th hole redesigned by Jack Nicklaus, 1998)
green_fee_notes: Green fee is $695 for April 2026 through March 2027, plus a $60 per-person cart fee for non-resort guests; single-bag caddie $175 and club rentals $120.
notable: Hosted six U.S. Opens (1972, 1982, 1992, 2000, 2010, 2019); four more awarded for 2027, 2032, 2037 and 2044
Hosted the 2023 U.S. Women's Open and the 1977 PGA Championship
Home of the PGA TOUR's AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am every February, a tradition dating to 1947
The par-3 7th (107 yards), par-3 17th and par-5 18th along Carmel Bay are among golf's most famous holes

confidence.course_rating: Men's Blue tee 74.9/144 per USGA NCRDB (CourseID 7817); the U.S. Open setup (~7,075 yds, 75.9/148) is not a daily-play tee and is excluded.
confidence.tees: Combo tee sets (Gold/White, White/Green, Green/Red) omitted from the directory card for space. Red tees play par 71 for men.
confidence.green_fee_notes: Rates read from pebblebeach.com's official rate table; tee times more than 2 days out require a resort stay.
confidence.handicap_per_hole: Men's stroke index from BlueGolf detailed scorecard.
